title: Anatomy of an IoT Endpoint Device
description: A visual breakdown of the core hardware components and data flow within a typical IoT sensor device, from physical input to network transmission.
relationships: Sensors capture physical phenomena and send analog signals to the ADC
The ADC converts analog signals to digital data for the MCU
The MCU processes the data and executes logic
The MCU sends commands to an Actuator to affect the physical world
The MCU uses the Communication Module to transmit data to a network gateway or cloud platform
All components are powered by the Power Source

visuals.title: Iot Physical Devices End Points
visuals.description: IoT Physical Devices and Endpoints Network - showing sensors, actuators, gateway, internet, cloud, dashboard, endpoint characteristics, and device types
